G — Functional Screening

Answer Yes / No / Unsure for each item. Referral flags are auto-created on save.

Functional Screening — Adults (18+)

Answer Yes / No / Unsure for each item. ⚠ Red questions are immediate-referral flags — a flagged answer generates a high-priority referral on save.

Hearing

→ Audiology / Hearing

Vision

→ Vision Assessment

Red flag — immediate referral if answer is "YES"

Communication

→ Speech & Language

Red flag — immediate referral if answer is "YES"

Mobility – Gross

→ Physiotherapy

Red flag — immediate referral if answer is "YES"

Mobility – Fine

→ Occupational Therapy

Cognition / Memory

→ Psychology / Counselling

Red flag — immediate referral if answer is "YES"

Social / Emotional

→ Counselling / Mental Health

Red flag — immediate referral if answer is "YES"

Self-care & Daily Living

→ OT / Support Services

Red flag — immediate referral if answer is "NO"

Work / Study / Productivity

→ Vocational Rehabilitation

H — Referral Source & Presenting Concern

Max 250 characters — avoid long narratives
Reports / Documents Uploaded
Previous reports, referral letters, doctor notes — PDF, JPG or PNG. Optional unless used to verify or adjust intake data.

I — Service Signposting & Booking

Select clinical categories first, then choose primary and additional service postings. Bookings are PENDING — Payment Admin confirms after eligibility check.

Selecting categories filters the service lists below.
The service point the client visits first after billing.
Each additional service creates a cross-posting booking. Leave blank if primary only.
📅 Service Availability: Live slot availability tracking is not yet integrated. Confirm slot availability with Customer Care before finalising the booking.

J — Payment Pathway Preview

Eligibility screening only — no payment processed here. On save, visit is handed off to Payment Admin.

Step 1 — Enrolled Schemes

Tick all schemes the client is enrolled in. Auto-detected entries are pre-ticked from the client record.

Social Health Authority enrolment
National Council for Persons with Disabilities
Tick if client holds an active private or employer health plan

Step 2 — Primary Payment Method

Select the method the client will use at billing. M-PESA can always override at the cashier window.
